name: enterprise-ai-framework
description: Chinese-first enterprise AI software engineering framework for SDLC workflows, PHP/ThinkPHP projects, documentation, review, and project context scanning.

interface.shortDescription: Enterprise SDLC workflows for Chinese AI coding teams
interface.longDescription: Provides reusable Codex skills for project initialization, API documentation, existing logic analysis, bug fixing, feature development, code review, and project scanning based on the Enterprise AI Software Engineering Framework.
defaultPrompt: INIT this project with Enterprise AI Framework.
